expectations.text: Output runs git status/diff and grounds the summary in actual file changes (not just vague recollection)
expectations.evidence: Agent ran git diff and git status, summary is grounded in real file changes across content-engine-dashboard and lead-gen

expectations.text: Output extracts at least one decision worth logging (session had real changes so decisions exist)
expectations.evidence: 'Key Decisions Worth Logging' section has 3 decisions, though they lack the full DECISION | REASONING | CONTEXT pipe format

expectations.text: Output includes the final closeout block with all 4 fields: summary, decisions logged, priorities updated, memory saved
expectations.evidence: No standardized closeout block. Output ends abruptly with the decisions list — no 'Session closed.' block.

expectations.text: Output explicitly checks context/current-priorities.md for whether it needs updating
expectations.evidence: No priorities check performed. Output does not mention current-priorities.md or whether it needs updating.
